name: GhostMarket: Broker Network
author: jlind
description: A v2 underground broker network for HackHub with a first-run tutorial, harsher heat danger curve, separate Amazin PrimeWire shopping website, 64 purchasable items, applications, a 10,000-rep rank ladder, hidden admin panel, intel probes, faction standing, escrow, upgrades, and history.
features: First-run tutorial and reusable Guide screen
Reset progress starts the tutorial again
Nonlinear heat danger curve: high heat sharply increases failure chance
Intel probe action with heat reduction
Faction standing and broker network screen
Expanded eleven-category marketplace with sixty-four purchasable listings
Expanded rank ladder up to SHADOW GOVERNMENT LEADER at 10,000 reputation
Secret admin panel unlocked from the GhostMarket logo
Admin reset button for wiping GhostMarket progress without changing bank balance
